summary: Completed frontend testing of CastleAdmin app. Login flow works correctly and dashboard loads with real Supabase data, but session persistence issue causes intermittent redirects back to login page.

critical_bugs.issue: Authentication session is not maintained consistently - user gets redirected back to login page after successful authentication and dashboard load
critical_bugs.impact: Users may experience intermittent logouts and need to re-authenticate
critical_bugs.technical_details: Login succeeds (console shows 'Sign in result: {user: Object, session: Object}'), dashboard loads with real data, but session expires or is not properly maintained, causing middleware to redirect to login

integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent session persistence after successful login

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with all UI elements
Login flow works with demo credentials (demo@castleadmin.com / Demo123!)
Dashboard loads with real KPI data from Supabase
Alert banner displays '10 actions require attention' with breakdown (2 overdue deliveries, 5 pending payments, 3 unassigned orders)
Driver status panel shows 5 drivers with real data (Darren Hollis, Leanne Carter, Marcus Webb, Priya Nair, Tom Bridges)
Driver status shows correct availability (3 available drivers)
Booking volume chart displays with title 'Booking Volume — Last 7 Days'
KPI cards show real data (Today's Bookings: 1, Unassigned: 1, Out for Delivery: 2, Completed: 0, Pending Payments: 5, Tomorrow's: 0)
Critical Alerts section displays with 2 critical and 5 warning alerts
Navigation menu is present with all required sections
Real Supabase data integration confirmed (not placeholder data)
CastleAdmin branding and styling display correctly
success_percentage: Frontend UI: 95%, Authentication Flow: 80%, Session Management: 60%
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue in authentication flow. The login works and dashboard loads correctly, but sessions are not maintained consistently, causing users to be redirected back to login. Check Supabase session configuration, cookie settings, and middleware session validation logic.
